allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add Google Gemini as AI provider with free tier support

- Add Gemini provider card in AI settings UI \(4-column grid\)
- Add Gemini settings section \(API key, model selection\)
- Implement callGemini\(\) in YouTubeEngagementAiService and YouTubeMetadataAiService
- Add testGemini\(\) connection test in AiSettingsController
- Add gemini_api_key to encrypted keys in Setting model
- Fix service key naming to match controller \(openai_api_key vs ai_openai_key\)
- Fix ollama_host key in services to match controller
- Models: gemini-2.0-flash, 2.0-flash-lite, 1.5-flash, 1.5-pro, 2.5 previews

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: prevent API key double-encryption and fix setValue parameter order

- Fix setValue\(\) parameter order: type and group were swapped causing
  boolean settings to be stored with wrong type
- Remove API key values from form inputs to prevent double-encryption
  on re-save \(decrypted key was being sent back to form, then encrypted
  again on each save\)
- Add autocomplete="off" to API key inputs to prevent browser auto-fill

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add AI Playground with multi-turn chat support

- Create AiChatService supporting multi-turn conversations across all 4 providers \(OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama\)
- Create AiPlaygroundController with chat endpoint
- Create AI Playground view with real-time chat UI \(Thai language\)
- Add sidebar navigation link for AI Playground
- Features: system prompt override, chat history, markdown rendering, typing indicator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
